message:
Running command: # check_antennas -verbose is in grt.tcl. This command internally calls PSM.
# The issue: check_antennas in OpenROAD calls analyze_power_grid which calls check_connectivity.
# If check_connectivity fails, it throws an exception.
#
# WORKAROUND APPROACH:
# Run a custom OpenROAD script that:
# 1. Reads the ODB from step 29 (DetailedPlacement, which is after GP)
# 2. Runs the GRT (already done - skip or reload guide)
# 3. Skips check_antennas
# 4. Writes the views
# 5. Creates state_out.json manually
#
# SIMPLER: Check if we can use GRT_ALLOW_CONGESTION=1 which skips some checks
# Or: look at check_antennas source in OpenROAD to see if there's a way to disable PSM check

# Find check_antennas tcl or C++ source
find /nix/store -name "*.tcl" -path "*/openroad/*" 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l "check_antennas\|checkAntennas" 2>/dev/null | head -3
echo "---"
# Check OpenROAD command help
/nix/store/zzypcxbrgw1qink1l7fwgwpbk7fvdwpg-openroad/bin/openroad -help 2>/dev/null | head -5 || true
echo "---check antennas help---"
echo "check_antennas -help" | /nix/store/zzypcxbrgw1qink1l7fwgwpbk7fvdwpg-openroad/bin/openroad -no_splash -exit 2>/dev/null | head -20

function.name: execute_bash
